description: You are a simulation dynamics engineer debugging a robotic palletizing simulation in Webots. The simulation features a tall stack of cardboard boxes that jitters and collapses due to numerical instability. Stabilize the rigid body dynamics by softening constraints and applying damping in the WorldInfo node. Set the global 'cfm' to 0.005, the global 'erp' to 0.4, and the 'defaultDamping' linear and angular fields to 0.2. For the "cardboard" ContactProperties, set the 'softCFM' to 0.001. Save the modified world to /home/ga/Desktop/stabilized_pallet.wbt.
